posts.text: U.S. Soldier in Maduro Raid Arrested for Insider Bets on Polymarket — There is no bigger insider than TACO himself, and pretty much everyone knows this, but they just can’t prove it. The soldier too might get away, as they need to prove guilt beyond reasonable doubt, which i doubt they can. I came across this video on these betting markets, Polymarket & Kalshi. These markets are heavily reliant on insider information/trading to maintain the accuracy of their predictions. These are like the most legally recognised insider-trader-friendly market. Most winning bets are placed by the insiders. On…

posts.text: U.S. Soldier in Maduro Raid Arrested for Insider Bets on Polymarket — Ok if it’s done by politicians banks or hedge funds. God forbid a soldier does this. Polymarket turning their winners is detrimental to the accuracy of their prediction charts.

posts.text: U.S. Soldier in Maduro Raid Arrested for Insider Bets on Polymarket — TIME – 24 Apr 26 Soldier Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket The special forces specialist allegedly profited more than $400,000 after betting on the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, an operation he was involved in. Summary A U.S. Special Forces master sergeant, Gannon Ken Van Dyke , has been charged after allegedly using confidential knowledge of the January 2026 U.S. mission that captured Nicolás Maduro to profit from bets on Polymarket .
